name: 𝚃𝚑𝚎 𝚃𝚠𝚘 𝙵𝚘𝚡𝚒𝚎𝚜 - 𝙿𝚒𝚌𝚔𝚒𝚗𝚐 𝙵𝚊𝚟𝚘𝚞𝚛𝚒𝚝𝚎𝚜!
description:
During your shift, these two weirdos ended up barging into your office to try and win you over... Awesome dude!!!! How positively radical...

"EXCUSE ME, SIR!
THERE MUST BE SOMEONE YOU'VE CONFUSED ME FOR
IF I COULD SEE SOMEONE WHO KNEW ME OR SOMEONE IN UNIFORM
I GO TO CHURCH ON SUNDAY
TRULY, USUALLY MORE!!!!"

P.S. NO SPIRITS IN THIS ONE!!!! OBVIOUSLY!!!
